mapper.select: SELECT ts, batch_id AS batchId, worker_id AS workerId, zone_id AS zoneId, progress, remaining_qty AS remainingQty, time_to_planned_end_min AS timeToPlannedEndMin, time_to_deadline_min AS timeToDeadlineMin, zone_backlog AS zoneBacklog, zone_active_workers AS zoneActiveWorkers, zone_location_cnt AS zoneLocationCnt, zone_blocking_issue_cnt AS zoneBlockingIssueCnt, worker_speed_30m_avg AS workerSpeed30mAvg, speed_label AS speedLabel, picked_total AS pickedTotal, required_total AS requiredTotal, created_at AS createdAt FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND ts = ( SELECT MAX(ts) FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rebalance_snapshots ( ts, batch_id, worker_id, zone_id, progress, remaining_qty, time_to_planned_end_min, time_to_deadline_min, zone_backlog, zone_active_workers, zone_location_cnt, zone_blocking_issue_cnt, worker_speed_30m_avg, speed_label, picked_total, required_total ) SELECT NOW() AS ts, l.batch_id, l.worker_id, u.assigned_zone_id AS zone_id, l.progress, l.remaining_qty, l.time_to_planned_end_min, COALESCE(zv.time_to_deadline_min, l.time_to_deadline_min), COALESCE(zv.zone_backlog, l.zone_backlog), COALESCE(zc.zone_active_workers, l.zone_active_workers), COALESCE(zv.zone_location_cnt, l.zone_location_cnt), COALESCE(zv.zone_blocking_issue_cnt, l.zone_blocking_issue_cnt), l.worker_speed_30m_avg, l.speed_label, l.picked_total, l.required_total FROM ( SELECT * FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND ts = ( SELECT MAX(ts) FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ) ) l JOIN users u ON u.user_id = l.worker_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT zone_id, MAX(time_to_deadline_min) AS time_to_deadline_min, MAX(zone_backlog) AS zone_backlog, MAX(zone_location_cnt) AS zone_location_cnt, MAX(zone_blocking_issue_cnt) AS zone_blocking_issue_cnt FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND ts = ( SELECT MAX(ts) FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ) GROUP BY zone_id ) zv ON zv.zone_id = u.assigned_zone_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT u.assigned_zone_id AS zone_id, COUNT(*) AS zone_active_workers FROM users u JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL WHERE u.role = 'WORKER' GROUP BY u.assigned_zone_id ) zc ON zc.zone_id = u.assigned_zone_id;
